briefs.title: ICBC Rate-Setting Formula Revised: Capital Provision Set at 7% of Required Premium from April 2023
briefs.summary: BC amended Special Direction IC2 to the BC Utilities Commission, redefining the policy year (April 1, 2023–March 31, 2025) and introducing a 7% capital provision in ICBC's compulsory vehicle insurance rate-setting framework.
briefs.action_required: Review how the new ICBC capital provision and rate-setting definitions may affect your fleet or commercial vehicle insurance premiums from April 2023.

key_dates.label: BC ICBC new policy year and capital provision rate-setting rules take effect
